common.tagline: A digital home for grace, growth, and service.

home.title: Welcome home
home.heroIntro: A digital home for grace, growth, and service.
home.scriptureVerse: For all have sinned, and come short of the glory of God; being justified freely by his grace through the redemption that is in Christ Jesus.
home.welcome: Wherever you are on the journey, you are welcome here. This is a place to find prayer support, the church's daily rhythm, and a clear next step.

quickActions.title: Where would you like to begin?
quickActions.connectSub: Reach a pastor and see what's next

events.title: Upcoming events
events.description: What's happening in the next few weeks
events.empty: No events on the calendar yet — check back soon.

announcements.title: Announcements
announcements.empty: Nothing new to share right now.

assistant.title: Grace Assistant
assistant.description: A gentle guide grounded in our church's teaching.
assistant.intro: Hello — I'm the Grace Assistant. Ask me anything about Bethesda House of Grace — service times, ministries, what we believe — or open up a Bible question. Tap a suggestion or type your own.
assistant.inputPlaceholderDisabled: Free questions will be available once the assistant is connected.
assistant.errorGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again in a moment.
assistant.previewNotice: The Grace Assistant is grounded in our church's published teaching. For deeper pastoral or theological conversations, reach out to Pastor Stephen Essah or the leadership team.
assistant.pastoralNote: The assistant is here to guide and encourage. It does not replace pastoral care, church leadership, or professional support in urgent situations.

prayer.title: Prayer
prayer.description: Tell us what is on your heart. We are honored to pray with you.
prayer.pastoralNote: The prayer team prays with care and confidentiality. If your situation is urgent or you are in crisis, please also reach out to a pastor or qualified professional support.

form.name: Your name
form.contactPlaceholder: We'll only use this to follow up gently
form.requestPlaceholder: Share what is on your heart…
form.visibilityHint: You can change your mind any time by reaching out to a pastor.

errors.name: Please enter your name.
errors.contact: Please share an email or phone so we can follow up.
errors.request: Please share what we can pray for.

prayer.mailtoNote: In this preview version, prayer requests are sent through your email app. A secure in-app submission system will be added when the church backend is connected.

connect.title: Connect
connect.description: A space to reach the church between Sundays — soon with personal tools, today with a direct line to the pastoral team.
connect.comingSoonBadge: Connect is still being built. The features below are on the way; until then, please reach out directly.
roadmapItems: Member sign-in with your own profile
A private prayer journal that travels with you
Sign-ups for connect groups and serving teams
Gentle push notifications for prayer and announcements
connect.contactBody: Until in-app messaging is ready, the surest way to connect is by email — or in person after the Sunday service. We read every message and reply with care.

notFound.title: This page has moved on
notFound.description: We couldn't find what you were looking for. The page may have been retired as the app evolved.

legal.title: Legal
legal.subtitle: Impressum, Datenschutzerklärung und AVV (in German, as legally required).

admin.title: Admin Preview
admin.helper: This preview shows the future content management area. Authentication, permissions, and editing capabilities will be added when the backend is connected.
admin.notFound: We couldn't find this admin section.
